arts.ttl: Chelsea set to HIJACK €90m Man Utd transfer
arts.sum: The 22-year-old was expected to seal an Old Trafford transfer this summer, but Man Utd were unwilling to match Everton’s reported asking price of €90 million (£75m) and Branthwaite remained at Goodison Park. Chelsea have been tipped to rival Manchester United for the signing of Everton defender Jarrad Branthwaite in 2025.

arts.ttl: Celtic lead Carney Chukwuemeka race as Chelsea 'set' transfer rules while £3.3m price drop opens Lyon raid door
arts.sum: The midfielder has yet to make a Premier League appearance for the Blues this season

arts.ttl: Who is Sam Rak-Sakyi? The tricky Chelsea youngster forcing bold Enzo Maresca squad decision
arts.sum: Having already come off the bench twice for Chelsea's senior team, young midfielder Sam Rak-Sakyi could be set to make his first start for the club. Having been at the club for over a decade, he is now a key player in Felipe Coelho's Under-21/Development Squad team featuring in the Premier League 2.

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk makes honest Chelsea title admission as Liverpool and Arsenal watch on
arts.sum: Liverpool captain Virgil van Dijk has responded to Chelsea's Premier League title challenge - saying that Enzo Maresca's side have shown they will be competitors this year. Mikel Arteta's side sit third, but what does Liverpool captain Van Dijk think as his side top the standings?

arts.ttl: 'If you don't do the right stuff': Sancho shares how Maresca reacts when a Chelsea player does something wrong
Arsenal transfer news: Mikel Arteta urged to follow Chelsea blueprint with "X-factor" signing
arts.sum: Arsenal expert Charles Watts tells Sports Mole that the Gunners need to seek out an "X-factor" forward and follow Chelsea's transfer blueprint.

arts.ttl: Chelsea team news: Four youngsters feature in Astana Conference League game
arts.sum: Chelsea name their much-changed starting lineup for Thursday's Conference League game with Astana in Kazakhstan.

arts.ttl: New stance: Chelsea perform U-turn over terms of likely transfer deal
arts.sum: Chelsea have reportedly changed their stance on young English midfielder Carney Chukwuemeka as they now only want to send him out on loan rather than sell him. Chukwuemeka’s Chelsea future has looked in real doubt for some time now after a lack of opportunities in the Blues’ first-team since Enzo Maresca took over as manager. arts.ttl: 'Made contact': Chelsea have opened talks with Premier League rivals to sign 'incredible' player - journalist
Chelsea rule out Benoît Badiashile departure, despite elite-level interest
arts.sum: Benoît Badiashile (23) has made 10 starts for Chelsea this season, however, only two of those have come in the Premier League. Six have come in the UEFA Europa Conference…
